scripts.dev:composio: npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-host build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-host start
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/dashboard build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/cli build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-wuzzuf build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-jobs build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/openclaw-wuzzuf build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/openclaw-jobs build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-host build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/dashboard typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-wuzzuf typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-jobs typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/openclaw-wuzzuf typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/openclaw-jobs typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-host typecheck
scripts.test:unit: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/domain.test.ts tests/store.test.ts tests/wuzzuf-parser.test.ts tests/security.test.ts tests/queue.test.ts tests/generic-domain.test.ts tests/worker-runtime.test.ts tests/resume-system.test.ts tests/ats-adapters.test.ts
scripts.test:contract: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/openclaw-manifest-contract.test.ts tests/openclaw-jobs-package.test.ts tests/wuzzuf-toolkit.test.ts tests/composio-jobs.test.ts tests/contracts.test.ts tests/generic-contracts.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/orchestrator.test.ts tests/bridge.test.ts tests/dashboard.test.ts tests/wuzzuf-store.test.ts tests/wuzzuf-integration.test.ts
scripts.test:dashboard:e2e: npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/dashboard build && playwright test --config apps/dashboard/playwright.config.ts
